summary.dominant_condition: Good Field Health with Minor Stress

primary_diagnosis.condition: Good Field Health with Minor Stress
risk_factors: Stress may spread to healthy areas

recommended_actions.description: Identify and address areas showing early stress symptoms
details: Use UAV imagery to map stress distribution
Ground-truth stressed areas to identify cause

recommended_actions.description: Increase surveillance to prevent stress escalation
details: Focus on stressed zones for detailed inspection

this_week.description: Identify and address areas showing early stress symptoms
details: Use UAV imagery to map stress distribution
Ground-truth stressed areas to identify cause

this_week.description: Increase surveillance to prevent stress escalation
details: Focus on stressed zones for detailed inspection

cost_estimate.note: Estimates only. Actual costs vary by region, suppliers, and market conditions.

fertilization.rates: 60-80 kg N/ha total, 40% basal + 30% tillering + 30% panicle initiation

irrigation.strategy: Maintain shallow standing water (2-5cm) for establishment
irrigation.notes: Can implement AWD after 20 DAT to save water while maintaining yield

pest_disease.priority: Stem borers, leaf folder, blast disease

general_principles: Use UAV monitoring as primary surveillance tool (Zhao2025)
Prioritize cultural and biological control before chemical (Logavitool2025)
Rotate pesticide modes of action to prevent resistance
Always follow label rates and pre-harvest intervals
ipm_guidelines.note: Stress detected. Review common pest and disease symptoms below.

stem_borer.symptoms: Dead hearts, white heads, stem tunneling
management: Timing: Early infestation, before larvae bore into stem
Apply at base of plant for nymph contact

leaf_folder.symptoms: Folded leaves with webbing, feeding damage

bacterial_leaf_blight.symptoms: Yellow to white lesions with wavy margins, systemic wilting
bacterial_leaf_blight.favorable_conditions: High humidity, warm temperatures, wounds from wind/insects
management: Avoid excessive nitrogen and maintain balanced nutrition
Copper-based bactericides at early symptom detection

blast.symptoms: Diamond-shaped lesions on leaves, neck rot, panicle blast
blast.favorable_conditions: High humidity, moderate temperatures (20-30°C), dense canopy
management: Apply at early symptom appearance and before flowering

sheath_blight.symptoms: Oval lesions on leaf sheaths near water line, greenish-gray with brown borders
sheath_blight.favorable_conditions: High humidity, dense planting, high nitrogen
management: Drain field periodically to reduce humidity
Apply at early tillering and booting stage

evidence_base.note: All recommendations are based on peer-reviewed international journals
primary_references: Mahmood et al. (2025) - Scientific Reports, Nature
Bouguettaya et al. (2022) - Neural Computing and Applications

Hassanein2018.title: A New Vegetation Segmentation Approach for Cropped Fields Based on Threshold Detection from Hue Histograms
Hassanein2018.authors: Hassanein, M., Lari, Z., El-Sheimy, N.

Zhao2025.title: Rice Canopy Disease and Pest Identification Based on Improved YOLOv5 and UAV Images

Mahmood2025.title: Deep Learning Framework Using UAV Imagery for Multi-Disease Detection in Cereal Crops

Logavitool2025.title: Field-Scale Detection of Bacterial Leaf Blight in Rice Based on UAV Multispectral Imaging and Deep Learning Frameworks

Yu2022.title: Research on Weed Identification Method in Rice Fields Based on UAV Remote Sensing

Zhang2023.title: Lightweight Deep Learning Models for High-Precision Rice Seedling Segmentation from UAV-Based Multispectral Images

Bouguettaya2022.title: Deep Learning Techniques to Classify Agricultural Crops Through UAV Imagery: A Review

evidence_base.methodology: Recommendations based on UAV-based crop health monitoring combined with agronomic best practices from 2018-2026 peer-reviewed literature
